prompt:
Build a modern unit converter web application.

The application should allow users to convert between:

- Length (meters, kilometers, miles, feet)
- Weight (grams, kilograms, pounds)
- Temperature (Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin)

Requirements:

- Two input fields (value and converted value)
- Dropdowns for selecting units
- Swap units button
- Real-time conversion while typing
- Clear button
- Responsive layout
- Clean modern design

The application should be fully interactive and run entirely in the browser without a backend.
appName: Modern Unit Converter Web Application. The Application Should Allow Users To Convert Between: - Length (meters, Kilometers, Miles, Feet) - Weight (grams, Kilograms, Pounds) - Temperature (celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin) Requirements: - Two Input Fields (value And Converted Value) - Dropdowns For Selecting Units - Swap Units Button - Real-time Conversion While Typing - Clear Button - Responsive Layout - Clean Modern Design The Application Should Be Fully Interactive And Run Entirely In The Browser Without A Backend
